rulings.Case Title: ROBERT HARR et al VS. VICTORIA MEWS ASSOCIATION et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Authorization For Release Of Pltf'S Psychological Psychiatric Records
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wenesday, March 9, 2011. Line 2. DEFENDANT VICTORIA MEWS ASSOCIATION'S Motion To Compel Authorization For Release Of Plaintiff's Psychological Psychiatric Records. Motion to compel authorization for release of Psychiatric Records is Denied. It is not Plaintiff's burden to make Stanford Hospital to comply with the subpoena. Defendant Needs to compel Subpoenaed party's compliance. = (302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: ROBERT FRENCH VS. GREENPOINT MORTGAGE FUNDING, INC. et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, March 9, 2011, line 3, DEFENDANTS GREENPOINT MORTGAGE FUNDING, INC., BANK OF AMERICA HOME LOANS, GMAC MORTGAGE, LLC DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Defendants¿ demurrers are granted in part and overruled in part: As to the 1st cause of action, the demurrer is overruled as to defendant Greenpoint and sustained with leave to amend as to defendants B of A and GMAC. While plaintiff has pled sufficient facts to support a claim of fraud as to Greenpoint, there are insufficient facts to show that defendants GMAC and B of A had knowledge of the fraud and intent to induce reliance. Moreover, the sheer fact that defendants have not produced the Note, without more, is not sufficient to state a cause of action. Plaintiff must plead facts that show that these defendants are not entitled to payments on the Note in this cause of action. As to the 2nd cause of action, the Court previously sustained the demurrer without leave to amend. That ruling stands. As to the 3rd cause of action for constructive fraud, the demurrer is overruled. Plaintiff has now pled that a fiduciary duty was owed by Greenpoint because it caused Triton to act as a dual agent in fulfilling its disclosure requests and paid Plaintiff¿s broker to act on its behalf. These facts are sufficient at the pleading stage. As to the 7th cause of action, a violation of Rosenthal Act, the demurrer is sustained with leave to amend. Plaintiff has attempted to plead facts showing debt collection activities beyond the ordinary foreclosure process because plaintiff is not in foreclosure. However, plaintiff has failed to plead facts showing debt collection activity that is unfair because he has not pled facts showing that the Defendants are not entitled to payments under the note or are otherwise not holders of the note. As to the 8th cause of action, a violation of CC §1572, the demurrer is overruled as to Greenpoint and sustained with leave to amend as to B of A and GMAC for th

rulings.Case Title: RONNEY BECKER VS. ROCK AND ROSE LANDSCAPING, et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Wednesday, March 9, 2011, line 8, DEFENDANT ROCK AND ROSE LANDSCAPING & BIRKMYER ASSOCIATES, DEMURRER TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED. THIS IS NOT A DERIVATIVE ACTION BUT AN INDIVIDUAL ACTION. SEE JARA V. SUPREMA MEATS INC., (2004) 121 CAL.APP.4TH 1238. FURTHER, PLAINTIFF HAS SUFFICIENTLY PLED CONSIDERATION UNDER THE 4TH CAUSE OF ACTION FOR BREACH OF CONTRACT AND FRAUD ALLEGATIONS UNDER THE 5TH CAUSE OF ACTION. DEFENDANT MUST FILE ANSWER WITHIN 10 DAYS OF ENTRY OF THE ORDER. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: MARIA MOHIUDDIN et al VS. WESTSIDE INVESTMENTS GROUP, INC. et al*****CASE TRANSFERRED TO LOS ANGELES COUNTY*****
